response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory greeting screen followed by a full vocal performance of the song "聖槍爆裂ボーイ" (Seisou Bakuretsu Boy), performed by La+ Darknesss and other Hololive members, concluding with a post-performance talking segment.

scenes.description: Performance of the song '聖槍爆裂ボーイ'. On-screen text credits 'れるりり&もじゃ' (rerulili & moja) for lyrics and composition. Performers include La+ Darknesss.
